For people with underlying health conditions 
Message 1 
If you have an underlying medical condition, do you know what to do if you get a respiratory virus? It's especially important to seek medical care if you get sick. Learn why timely treatment is crucial to your health at https://bit.ly/41LBfgX 
Message 2 
Certain underlying conditions can weaken our immune system — making it harder to fight off infections. So if you have a pre-existing medical condition, getting quick medical attention when you have respiratory symptoms is important for your overall health and well-being. https://bit.ly/41LBfgX
